name: claude-code-marketplace-tools
description: Developer tools for Claude Code marketplace: agent validation against the Agent Framework

scripts.validate: node tools/validate-agent.js all && node tools/validate-skill.js all && node tools/validate-command.js all
scripts.validate:all: node tools/validate-agent.js all && node tools/validate-skill.js all && node tools/validate-command.js all
scripts.validate:errors: node tools/validate-agent.js all --errors-only && node tools/validate-skill.js all --errors-only && node tools/validate-command.js all --errors-only
